name: Fresh Peach Cobbler W/Four Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease an 11 x 7-inch glass baking dish.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine peaches, 1 cup sugar, and water. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently. Keep the peach mixture hot.
4. In a separate bowl, beat Eggs with 1 cup sugar until fluffy. Gradually add Shortening.
5. Add Milk; stir in Flour, Baking Powder, and Salt.
6. Spread batter evenly in prepared baking dish. Pour hot peaches over the batter.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until tender. Serve warm with cream, whipped cream, or Vanilla ice cream.
More Fruit Cobblers: For peaches, substitute fresh or thawed frozen blueberries, strawberries, or fresh apples or blackberries. If using frozen fruit packed in sugar syrup, omit the first 1 cup of sugar.
